name: glycyrrhiza glabra
title: best benefits of glycyrrhiza glabra
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra reduces nausea, which is a beneficial effect characterized by the alleviation of queasiness and discomfort associated with vomiting or the urge to vomit. This benefit is important because nausea can lead to dehydration, electrolyte imbalances, and impaired nutrient absorption, making it a critical issue for individuals undergoing chemotherapy, experiencing morning sickness during pregnancy, or recovering from surgery.
